Caption: (a) Effect of temperature on leaching of valuable metals from raw waste materials with 0.5 M H2SO4; (b) effect of reaction time on leaching of valuable metals from raw waste materials and activated waste with 1.5 M H2SO4 at 60 °C; (c) and (d) schemes for selective extraction of Li+; effects of (e) rotation speed, (f) rotation time and (g) ball/waste mass ratio on selective extraction of Li+.

SEM images of (a) the raw waste and waste activated at (b) 200 rpm, (c) 400 rpm, (d) 600 rpm, and (e) 800 rpm; (f) local enlarged SEM image of the waste activated at 800 rpm; (g) TEM images, (h) relevant SAED images, and (i) HRTEM images of the waste; (j) TEM images, (k) relevant SAED images, and (l) HRTEM images of the activated waste from the 600 rpm system.

(a) Particle size distributions for the waste treated at different rotation speeds; (b) Cumulative distributions of the particle size distribution; (c) N2 adsorption-desorption curves for the waste treated at different rotation speeds; (d) XRD patterns for the products from the activation processes with different rotation speeds (the characterization angles ranged from 5 to 90° in 9.01 min); (e) UDM plot for different activated wastes; (f) relationship between the micro-strain (Ɛ) and rotation speed; (g) OCP results for the stage 1 intermediate products of the waste obtained after activation at different rotational speeds; (h) TG-MS results for the intermediate product from 800 rpm; (i) DFT results for ΔH of the different reactions.

(a) Raman spectra for the residues of the first stage; (b) valence state for cobalt in the spent LCO, activated spent LCO, and leaching residues (HCoO2); (c) EPR results for the waste formed with different activation time; XPS results for the (d) C 1s, (e) O 1s, and (f) Co 2p XPS data for the raw waste; (g) C 1s, (h) O 1s, and (i) Co 2p XPS data for the activated waste.

(a) XRD patterns for the activated waste and leaching residue; (b) TG-MS results for the leaching residue (HCoO2); (c) SEM image of the HCoO2; (d) schematic diagram of reaction mechanism; (e) leaching results for the raw materials and activated waste including LCO, NCM111, NCM523, NCM622, NCM811 and LMO (data for activated spent LCO and LMO were obtained at 800 rpm; LCO is from the waste and other cathodes are commercial materials).

(a) Charge/discharge voltage profiles for scans from 0.01 to 3.0 V (vs. Li+/Li) at a current density of 200 mA g−1; (b) rate capacity curves of materials between 0.01 and 3.0 V (vs. Li+/Li); (c) capacity versus cycle number for discharge curves generated at 0.2 A g−1 between 0.01 and 3.0 V (vs. Li+/Li); the line with balls and the line with squares represented the discharge capacity and coulombic efficiency of the materials, respectively.
